disease-drug-pair-201.extracted_claim: A peer-reviewed controlled human study directly evaluated PILOT-DRUG-201 in Pilot Rare Disease 201 and reported a credible positive primary efficacy signal.
disease-drug-pair-201.title: Synthetic pilot evidence for disease-drug-pair-201

disease-drug-pair-202.extracted_claim: A disease-model study reported a preliminary positive preclinical signal for PILOT-DRUG-202 in Pilot Rare Disease 202; no direct human efficacy study was available.
disease-drug-pair-202.title: Synthetic pilot evidence for disease-drug-pair-202

disease-drug-pair-203.extracted_claim: Two controlled human studies directly evaluated PILOT-DRUG-203 in Pilot Rare Disease 203 and consistently reported no meaningful efficacy.
disease-drug-pair-203.title: Synthetic pilot evidence for disease-drug-pair-203
